query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN technique LIKE '%Saunders Waterford 300gsm hot press cotton rag paper%' THEN 1 END) as updated_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN technique LIKE '%Saunders Waterford 300gsm%' AND technique NOT LIKE '%hot press cotton rag paper%' THEN 1 END) as old_count
FROM works;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN technique LIKE '%Saunders Waterford 300gsm%' AND technique NOT LIKE '%hot press cotton rag paper%' THEN 1 END) as old_count
